title: Juno albomarginata

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Juno albomarginata include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal effects. Juno albomarginata is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and fever.
